posts.raw_content: President Trump is fighting a long and deeply entrenched global Mafioso that the Democrats and RINO Republicans are members of.. For example, Obama and Biden gave billions to Iran which enabled their missile building and weapon stockpiling.. They also went to war with US energy production trying to cripple the US, but why?? The big long term plan was to have Iran rise up and hold the entire Middle East oil/energy hostage or just take over which would have crippled the worlds energy supply and maybe made the USA vulnerable for a Leftist commie takeover.. So to me paying more for gasoline and stuff from the store is a far lesser pain than some of the alternatives like nationwide violent riots.. So when you think about why we attacked Iran think about this global struggle to claw back from these evil people a stable planet.. There is certainly more to this like blown Russian gas pipelines and other things but maybe those dots on the murder board will start lining up for you if you think about this all in a "bigger plan" scenario..
